chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-518 of 2023 _____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. _____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For order on Misc. No.3772/2023 2. For order on office objection No.18 3. For order on Misc. No.2999/2023 4. For order on Misc. No.3000/2023 5. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2023 Mr. Abdul Wahab Baloch, Advocate for the Petitioners --------------- YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J.- The Petitioners claim to reside in a project known as ‘Jinnah Complex’, situated on M.A Jinnah Road, Karachi, and alleged that the Respondent Nos. 8 to 11, who are said to be transporters, have illegally set up bus stands in that vicinity, which are causing congestion and resulting in a public nuisance. However, other than a letter dated 13.10.2022 addressed by the Petitioner No.2 to the Secretary Transport and other functionaries, including the Police authorities, the matter does not otherwise appear to have been pursued by the Petitioner before any of those fora, nor has any effort apparently been made to institute any appropriate proceeding under the relevant penal provisions or before the anti-encroachment authority. Under the circumstances, we dispose of the Petition with the direction to Petitioners to pursue the matter before the concerned authorities and are sanguine that if any proper approach is made, the same would be attended to in accordance with law. JUDGE CHIEF JUSTICE TariqAli/PA
